name: Issue Investigation
description: Investigate a reported issue, gather the evidence, and return a clear conclusion in the same conversation.
whenToUse: Use this when you want to investigate a reported issue, gather the evidence, and return a clear conclusion in the same conversation.
Best for support and success teams that want repeatable work without changing the tools they already use.

stages.title: Read main Thread
stages.summary: Read the full stored thread and source context before forming hypotheses.

stages.title: Clarify Missing Context
stages.summary: Ask a same-thread clarification only when missing evidence blocks a safe conclusion; otherwise record why clarification was skipped.

stages.title: Investigate Issue
stages.summary: Trace the symptom through project evidence, validate or bound root cause, and identify affected surfaces and delivery direction.

stages.title: Post Support Conclusion
stages.summary: Post the evidence-backed conclusion in the main thread and tell the person that task creation is a separate instructed handoff.
